HEADING: FastComments
EMBED_DESCRIPTION: Add a patient-education discussion to your website or portal-adjacent page. Open this URL in an iframe, or link to it from your patient experience.
EMBED_TOPIC_NOTE: Change the topic parameter to create a separate discussion thread for each topic, for example ?topic=managing-diabetes.
DISCONNECT_DESCRIPTION: Disconnecting removes FastComments' access to your athenahealth account. Your stored discussions and configuration are kept in case you reconnect.
